entries.source: Explore history, public figures, causes, debates, philosophy, and source critique with AI learning modes that separate evidence from simulation.

entries.value: Bincika ainihi, ilimi, adalci, 'yanci, farin ciki, da sauran tambayoyi masu zurfi ta hanyar tunani mai kyau.

entries.source: Explore inspir AI learning by subject: math, writing, coding, history, homework, and exam prep, each connected to public guest modes, guides, prompts, and review loops.
entries.value: Bincika inspir koyon AI ta fanni: lissafi, rubutu, rubuta lamba, tarihi, aikin gida, da shirin jarabawa, each connected don yanayoyin baƙo na jama’a, jagorori, saƙonni, da madaukai na bita.

entries.source: Explore public AI learning modes teachers can use to evaluate Socratic tutoring, quizzes, flashcards, writing feedback, source critique, and classroom-ready study workflows.

entries.source: Feynman Tutor
entries.value: Malami Feynman

entries.source: Feynman Tutor AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Try explaining a concept simply. Your tutor spots gaps, asks questions, and helps you rebuild the explanation.
entries.value: Malamin Feynman yanayin koyo ne na AI mai mayar da hankali; ana amfani da AI don koyo maimakon tara amsoshi kawai. An gina yanayin a kan aiki takamaimai: Gwada explaining a ra’ayi simply. naka malami spots gaps, asks tambayoyi, da helps kai rebuild the explanation.

entries.source: Finish by writing a five-bullet recap from memory, then ask for the one weak spot to review tomorrow.
entries.value: Kammala ta rubutu a five-bullet recap daga ƙwaƙwalwa, sannan tambaya don the one wurin rauni don bita tomorrow.

entries.source: Finish by writing the idea back from memory.
entries.value: Kammala ta rubutu the ra’ayi back daga ƙwaƙwalwa.

entries.value: Kammala tare da a tambayoyi, katin tunatarwa, ko Socratic bincika don haka the zama leaves a trace.

entries.source: Finish with evidence of learning.
entries.value: Kammala tare da shaida na learning.

entries.value: Koyo daga ka’idojin farko

entries.source: First, the tutor identifies the target. "I want to understand opportunity cost" is different from "I need to solve this economics homework question" or "I need to defend a position in debate." The target shapes the questions.
entries.value: Farko, the malami identifies the target. "I want don fahimci opportunity cost" shi ne different daga "I buƙata don warware this tattalin arziki aikin gida tambaya" ko "I buƙata don defend a position a cikin muhawara." target shapes the tambayoyi.

entries.value: Mai Gina Katin Tunatarwa

entries.source: Flashcard Builder prompts and study loop
entries.value: Saƙonnin Mai Gina Katunan Tunatarwa da madaukin karatu

entries.source: flashcard generation
entries.value: ƙirƙirar katunan walƙiya

entries.source: Flashcards are one of the simplest ways to do this.
entries.value: Katunan tunatarwa suna one na the simplest ways don do this.

entries.source: Flashcards are powerful, but they are not the whole study process. They are best for retrieval, vocabulary, definitions, formulas, distinctions, and key examples. They are weaker when the learner has never understood the idea in the first place.
entries.value: Katunan tunatarwa suna powerful, amma su ba su the whole karatu process. su suna mafi kyau don retrieval, kalmomi, definitions, formulas, distinctions, da muhimmi examples. su suna weaker lokacin da the mai koyo has never understood the ra’ayi a cikin the farko place.

entries.source: Flashcards work best when they test one idea at a time, reveal answers only after effort, and review missed cards sooner.
entries.value: Katunan tunatarwa work mafi kyau lokacin da su gwada one ra’ayi at a lokaci, reveal amsoshi only bayan effort, da bita missed katuna sooner.

entries.source: For a deeper route, read the Flashcard Builder guide and the Flashcard Builder prompts and study loop. The goal is not a beautiful deck. The goal is remembering more when the notes are gone.
entries.value: Don a zurfafa hanya, karanta the katin tunatarwa mai gina jagora da the katin tunatarwa mai gina saƙonni da madaukin karatu. goal ba a beautiful deck. goal shi ne remembering ƙarin lokacin da the bayanai suna gone.

entries.source: For a learner, that can feel very different from searching the web. Search gives pages. A learning companion gives a path.
entries.value: Don a mai koyo, that can feel very different daga searching the web. bincike gives shafuka. Wani abokin koyo gives a path.

entries.source: For a wider view of how the public pages connect, browse the AI learning map, the subject hubs, or the AI learning prompt library. Those pages are designed to make the product understandable to learners and discoverable to search systems without hiding the useful parts behind an account wall.
entries.value: Don a wider duba na yadda the shafukan jama’a connect, bincika the koyon AI taswira, the cibiyoyin fanni, ko the koyon AI dakin karatun saƙonni. Those shafuka suna designed don sa the samfuri understandable don masu koyo da discoverable don bincike systems ba tare da hiding the mai amfani parts behind an asusu wall.

entries.source: For example, a learner studying democracy might talk with Ambedkar, then ask Source Critic to evaluate a speech or constitutional passage. A learner studying a city can start with Geography Explorer to understand place, then move into historical conversation.

entries.source: For teachers
entries.value: Ga malamai

entries.source: For the first time, a former colony with no prior national history became a global power. The kings and queens of Europe were overthrown, and the United States of America emerged as a symbol of democracy, capitalism, and a free world. At the same time, a new ideology of communism emerged and the Soviet Union became its practical embodiment.
entries.value: Don the farko lokaci, a former colony tare da no prior national tarihi became a global power. kings da queens na Europe sun kasance overthrown, da the United States na America emerged as a symbol na democracy, capitalism, da a kyauta duniya. At the same lokaci, a sabo ideology na communism emerged da the Soviet Union became its mai amfani embodiment.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Ask any question and learn through clear explanations, examples, follow-up prompts, and patient AI tutoring.
entries.value: A wannan yanayin, aikin mai sauƙi ne: Tambaya any tambaya da koyi ta hanyar bayyananne explanations, examples, follow-up saƙonni, da patient koyarwar AI.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Ask questions, challenge ideas, and learn history through grounded conversations with public figures from the past.
entries.value: A wannan yanayin, aikin mai sauƙi ne: Tambaya tambayoyi, ƙalubalanci ideas, da koyi tarihi ta hanyar grounded conversations tare da na jama’a figures daga the past.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Brainstorm projects, stories, designs, titles, experiments, and unexpected angles.
entries.value: A wannan yanayin, aikin mai sauƙi ne: Brainstorm projects, labarai, designs, titles, experiments, da unexpected angles.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Bring a passage or book idea and build comprehension through summaries, vocabulary, inference, and discussion.
entries.value: A wannan yanayin, aikin mai sauƙi ne: Bring a passage ko book ra’ayi da gina comprehension ta hanyar taƙaitawa, kalmomi, inference, da discussion.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Build a temporal passport, clear the travel advisory, and explore a historical world through scene, map, timeline, people, rules, inventory, and evidence.
entries.value: A wannan yanayin, aikin mai sauƙi ne: Gina a temporal passport, bayyananne the tafiya advisory, da bincika a na tarihi duniya ta hanyar yanayi, taswira, timeline, people, rules, inventory, da shaida.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Build vocabulary with meaning, examples, pronunciation cues, memory hooks, and quick practice.
entries.value: A wannan yanayin, aikin mai sauƙi ne: Gina kalmomi tare da meaning, examples, pronunciation cues, ƙwaƙwalwa hooks, da quick atisaye.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Convert facts, lists, speeches, or sequences into memorable mental scenes.
entries.value: A wannan yanayin, aikin mai sauƙi ne: Convert gaskiya, lists, speeches, ko sequences zuwa memorable mental scenes.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Create a study plan around your time, energy, goals, and weak spots.
entries.value: A wannan yanayin, aikin mai sauƙi ne: Ƙirƙiri a shirin karatu a kusa da naka lokaci, energy, goals, da weak spots.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Debate any topic, get challenged, compare claims, and learn how to make stronger arguments.
entries.value: A wannan yanayin, aikin mai sauƙi ne: Muhawara any batu, get challenged, kwatanta ikirarai, da koyi yadda don sa stronger hujjoji.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Enter a realistic case, make decisions, see consequences, and learn the principle behind each choice.
entries.value: A wannan yanayin, aikin mai sauƙi ne: Shiga a mai kama da gaske case, sa decisions, duba consequences, da koyi the principle behind each choice.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Evaluate articles, claims, videos, or posts for evidence, bias, reliability, and missing context.
entries.value: A wannan yanayin, aikin mai sauƙi ne: Tantance kasidu, ikirarai, videos, ko posts don shaida, son kai, reliability, da missing mahaɗi.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Explore artworks, styles, artists, visual choices, and what makes an image powerful.
entries.value: A wannan yanayin, aikin mai sauƙi ne: Bincika artworks, styles, artists, na gani choices, da abin da makes an image powerful.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Explore careers through interests, skills, day-in-the-life examples, and next steps.
entries.value: A wannan yanayin, aikin mai sauƙi ne: Bincika careers ta hanyar interests, skills, day-a cikin-the-life examples, da na gaba matakai.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Explore countries, cities, rivers, climates, migration, resources, and how geography shapes life.
entries.value: A wannan yanayin, aikin mai sauƙi ne: Bincika countries, cities, rivers, climates, migration, resources, da yadda geography shapes life.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Explore identity, knowledge, fairness, freedom, happiness, and other deep questions through careful reasoning.
entries.value: A wannan yanayin, aikin mai sauƙi ne: Bincika identity, ilimi, fairness, freedom, happiness, da other deep tambayoyi ta hanyar careful tunani.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Generate a focused multiple-choice quiz on any subject and review explanations after each answer.
entries.value: A wannan yanayin, aikin mai sauƙi ne: Samar a mai mayar da hankali multiple-choice tambayoyi a kan any fanni da bita explanations bayan each amsa.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Get unstuck emotionally, find a smaller next step, and rebuild momentum without guilt.
entries.value: A wannan yanayin, aikin mai sauƙi ne: Get unstuck emotionally, find a ƙarami na gaba mataki, da rebuild momentum ba tare da guilt.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Get unstuck on homework with ethical hints, examples, checks, and step-by-step coaching.
entries.value: A wannan yanayin, aikin mai sauƙi ne: Get unstuck a kan aikin gida tare da ethical alamomi, examples, bincike, da mataki-ta-mataki coaching.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Improve writing with planning, revision, structure, and feedback that keeps your voice intact.
entries.value: A wannan yanayin, aikin mai sauƙi ne: Inganta rubutu tare da tsarawa, bita, structure, da martani that keeps naka voice intact.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Learn by doing, seeing, comparing, repairing, and proving mastery. The app builds a live lesson canvas around your goal instead of turning instruction into a long chat. Try: "Teach me financial modeling."
entries.value: A wannan yanayin, aikin mai sauƙi ne: Koyi ta doing, seeing, comparing, repairing, da proving mastery. manhaja builds a kai tsaye lesson canvas a kusa da naka goal maimakon turning instruction zuwa a doguwar hira. gwada: "koyar me financial modeling."

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Learn constitutions, democracy, elections, courts, rights, duties, and public policy.
entries.value: A wannan yanayin, aikin mai sauƙi ne: Koyi constitutions, democracy, elections, courts, haƙƙoƙi, duties, da na jama’a manufa.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Learn notes, chords, scales, rhythm, ear training ideas, and how songs are built.
entries.value: A wannan yanayin, aikin mai sauƙi ne: Koyi bayanai, chords, scales, rhythm, ear training ideas, da yadda songs suna an gina.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Learn through focused questions, hints, and reflection instead of passive answer reading.
entries.value: A wannan yanayin, aikin mai sauƙi ne: Koyi ta hanyar mai mayar da hankali tambayoyi, alamomi, da tunani maimakon marar aiki amsa karatu.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Make learning feel like a game with quests, levels, points, challenges, and boss rounds.
entries.value: A wannan yanayin, aikin mai sauƙi ne: Sa learning feel like a wasa tare da ƙalubale, matakai, maki, challenges, da boss rounds.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Map how ideas relate, from causes and effects to categories, examples, and contradictions.
entries.value: A wannan yanayin, aikin mai sauƙi ne: Taswira yadda ideas relate, daga causes da effects don rukuni-rukuni, examples, da contradictions.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Notice what helps you learn, what gets in the way, and how to become a stronger learner.
entries.value: A wannan yanayin, aikin mai sauƙi ne: Sanarwa abin da helps kai koyi, abin da gets a cikin the way, da yadda don become a stronger mai koyo.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Open a shared workspace with an AI collaborator. Make a rough artifact, trade edits, challenge weak spots, log decisions, and leave with concrete progress.
entries.value: A wannan yanayin, aikin mai sauƙi ne: Bude a shared workspace tare da an AI collaborator. sa a rough artifact, trade edits, ƙalubalanci weak spots, log decisions, da leave tare da concrete ci gaba.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Paste a question, your answer, and the expected answer if you have it. Your buddy explains the reasoning and helps you avoid the same mistake next time.
entries.value: A wannan yanayin, aikin mai sauƙi ne: Paste a tambaya, naka amsa, da the expected amsa if kai have it. naka buddy explains the tunani da helps kai guji the same kuskure na gaba lokaci.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Paste data, chart descriptions, or results and learn what they mean, what they do not mean, and what to ask next.
entries.value: A wannan yanayin, aikin mai sauƙi ne: Paste bayanai, chart descriptions, ko results da koyi abin da su mean, abin da su kada a mean, da abin da don tambaya na gaba.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Plan a school, creative, coding, or personal project with scope, milestones, blockers, and next actions.
entries.value: A wannan yanayin, aikin mai sauƙi ne: Tsara a makaranta, creative, rubuta lamba, ko sirri aiki tare da scope, milestones, blockers, da na gaba actions.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Plan and run quick review sessions that strengthen long-term memory.
entries.value: A wannan yanayin, aikin mai sauƙi ne: Tsara da run quick bita sessions that strengthen ƙwaƙwalwar dogon lokaci.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Plan safe demonstrations, understand variables, predict outcomes, and reason from evidence like a scientist.
entries.value: A wannan yanayin, aikin mai sauƙi ne: Tsara safe demonstrations, fahimci variables, predict outcomes, da reason daga shaida like a scientist.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Play with markets, scarcity, incentives, policy, and personal finance through simple simulations.
entries.value: A wannan yanayin, aikin mai sauƙi ne: Kunna tare da markets, scarcity, incentives, manufa, da sirri finance ta hanyar mai sauƙi simulations.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Practice a language in realistic scenarios like cafes, interviews, travel, and daily life, with corrections after each turn.
entries.value: A wannan yanayin, aikin mai sauƙi ne: Atisaye a harshe a cikin mai kama da gaske scenarios like cafes, interviews, tafiya, da daily life, tare da corrections bayan each turn.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Practice argument by debating a public or fictional personality on a topic you choose.
entries.value: A wannan yanayin, aikin mai sauƙi ne: Atisaye hujja ta debating a na jama’a ko fictional personality a kan a batu kai zaɓi.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Practice negotiation, conflict, customer support, leadership, or any high-stakes conversation.
entries.value: A wannan yanayin, aikin mai sauƙi ne: Atisaye negotiation, conflict, customer tallafi, leadership, ko any high-stakes conversation.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Practice viva, oral exams, project defenses, and rapid follow-up questions with calm feedback.
entries.value: A wannan yanayin, aikin mai sauƙi ne: Atisaye viva, oral exams, aiki defenses, da rapid follow-up tambayoyi tare da calm martani.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Prepare for school, internship, job, or scholarship interviews with realistic questions and feedback.
entries.value: A wannan yanayin, aikin mai sauƙi ne: Prepare don makaranta, internship, job, ko scholarship interviews tare da mai kama da gaske tambayoyi da martani.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Prepare speeches, presentations, interviews, or oral exams with prompts, timing, and feedback on structure.
entries.value: A wannan yanayin, aikin mai sauƙi ne: Prepare speeches, presentations, interviews, ko oral exams tare da saƙonni, timing, da martani a kan structure.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Say what you think is happening, and your buddy diagnoses hidden misconceptions with gentle tests.
entries.value: A wannan yanayin, aikin mai sauƙi ne: Say abin da kai think shi ne happening, da naka buddy diagnoses hidden rashin fahimta tare da gentle tests.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Try explaining a concept simply. Your tutor spots gaps, asks questions, and helps you rebuild the explanation.
entries.value: A wannan yanayin, aikin mai sauƙi ne: Gwada explaining a ra’ayi simply. naka malami spots gaps, asks tambayoyi, da helps kai rebuild the explanation.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Turn a broad topic into research questions, search terms, outlines, and source notes.
entries.value: A wannan yanayin, aikin mai sauƙi ne: Turn a broad batu zuwa bincike tambayoyi, bincike terms, outlines, da tushe bayanai.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Turn concepts into stories, characters, conflicts, and memorable scenes.
entries.value: A wannan yanayin, aikin mai sauƙi ne: Turn ra’ayoyi zuwa labarai, characters, conflicts, da memorable scenes.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Turn intentions into small repeatable learning habits with triggers, rewards, and recovery plans.
entries.value: A wannan yanayin, aikin mai sauƙi ne: Turn intentions zuwa small repeatable learning dabi’u tare da triggers, rewards, da recovery tsare-tsare.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Turn notes or topics into focused flashcards with hints, answers, examples, and common traps.
entries.value: A wannan yanayin, aikin mai sauƙi ne: Turn bayanai ko batutuwa zuwa mai mayar da hankali katunan tunatarwa tare da alamomi, amsoshi, examples, da na kowa traps.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Turn your syllabus, exam date, time, and weak areas into a practical study plan.
entries.value: A wannan yanayin, aikin mai sauƙi ne: Turn naka syllabus, exam date, lokaci, da wuraren rauni zuwa a mai amfani shirin karatu.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Understand code, debug errors, learn programming concepts, and build small projects step by step.
entries.value: A wannan yanayin, aikin mai sauƙi ne: Fahimci lamba, gyara kuskuren lamba errors, koyi shirye-shiryen kwamfuta ra’ayoyi, da gina small projects mataki ta mataki.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Unpack historical events through causes, triggers, consequences, and alternative possibilities.
entries.value: A wannan yanayin, aikin mai sauƙi ne: Unpack na tarihi events ta hanyar causes, triggers, consequences, da madadin possibilities.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Work through algebra, calculus, word problems, and math concepts one step at a time with an AI coach.
entries.value: A wannan yanayin, aikin mai sauƙi ne: Work ta hanyar aljebra, calculus, word problems, da lissafi ra’ayoyi one mataki at a lokaci tare da an AI koci.

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Work through dilemmas by weighing stakeholders, consequences, duties, rights, and tradeoffs.
entries.value: A wannan yanayin, aikin mai sauƙi ne: Work ta hanyar dilemmas ta weighing stakeholders, consequences, duties, haƙƙoƙi, da tradeoffs.

entries.source: For writing, that means using Writing Coach to improve a thesis, structure, or paragraph while keeping your voice. For code, it means using Code Tutor to explain errors, ask you to predict output, and help you debug rather than pasting a complete solution. For exams, it means using Exam Prep Planner to decide what to review first and how to test yourself.
entries.value: Don rubutu, that means ta amfani da rubutu koci don inganta a thesis, structure, ko paragraph while keeping naka voice. don lamba, it means ta amfani da lamba malami don bayyana errors, tambaya kai don predict output, da taimako kai gyara kuskuren lamba rather fiye da pasting a complete solution. don exams, it means ta amfani da shirin jarabawa mai tsarawa don decide abin da don bita farko da yadda don gwada yourself.

entries.value: Mai Gina Tambayoyin AI na Kyauta ga Kowane Batu

entries.source: Free AI Quiz Builder For Any Topic is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Pick any topic and face a focused 10-question multiple-choice quiz. You answer one question at a time, get instant feedback, and finish with a score and review.
entries.value: Mai Gina Tambayoyin AI na Kyauta ga Kowane Batu hanya ce mai mayar da hankali ta amfani da AI don koyo maimakon tara amsoshi kawai. An gina yanayin a kan aiki takamaimai: Pick any batu da face a mai mayar da hankali 10-tambaya multiple-choice tambayoyi. kai amsa one tambaya at a lokaci, get instant martani, da kammala tare da a score da bita.
